> Patch Set 2:
> 
> (1 comment)

Ugh. Yes we need:

 if (likely(iter_is_ubuf(i)) { ... }

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> So this a RHEL 9.3/9.4 bug due to a lazy backport of iter_ubuf?

Looking at 9.3 and 9.4 sources they seem correct.
9.3 does not have ubuf() and 9.4 does have ubuf

commit.subject: LU-17993 llite: add further check for user buffer
commit.message:
LU-17993 llite: add further check for user buffer

The alignment check in "ll_iov_iter_alignment" for the user buffer
could be wrong if the IO count is less than PAGE_SIZE, add more
checks for it.

Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I0241d5cd6f9ca71a1de95313fdc483261c2b7f42
